rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF JASON KENNETH CHEUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/12/2021. 1) No proof of service of notice of this petition to the court-appointed counsel for the minor is on file. 2) The first account period cannot exceed two years. LRSF 14.35A. 3) The corrected final inventory and appraisal shows no statement about the bond. The filing date also appears incorrect. 4) No GC-042 form showing that a copy of the inventory and appraisal was given to the court-appointed counsel for the minor is on file. 5) No statement of compensation under Probate Code section 1064(a)(2) is included. 6) Re paragraph 10, no order setting the bond appears to have been prepared and submitted to the Court by the petitioner's attorney, even though the minutes of the 12/28/2020 hearing indicate that the attorney was asked to do so. 7) The summary of account must be on a mandatory Judicial Council form GC-400/405 (SUM). 8) An original statement or other documentation from which the value of the accrued pension benefits as of 11/07/2016 can be verified must be filed. 9) Chase Bank filed a GC-051 form to inform the Court that the petitioner opened a guardianship account on 12/14/2016. What happened to this Chase account? 10) No GC-051 form has been filed by East West Bank. 11) An original statement of the East West Bank account from which the balance as of 11/07/2018 can be verified must be filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GAUALOFA M. CASEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/5/2021. 1) Unless otherwise permitted for good cause, if an account exceeds two years, the first two years must be filed separately. [LRSF 14.35 A.] 2) Please state the name and date of death for Decedent's predeceased husband. 3) Please explain the reimbursement sought by Lilac Law Group. The Opening Probate Filing Fee was $450.00, The Petition for Approval of Sale fee was $435.00, The petition for distribution fee was $435.00. 4) The corrected I&A alleges $800,025.00 in assets. Please provide legal authority for including money added by administrator on the I&A. It appears the I&A must be amended. 5) The account begins with $800,000.00. The corrected I&A alleges $850,025.00 in assets. Please provide legal authority for the account starting value not matching the I&A. 6) On schedule C disbursements please explain Buyer Prepaid interest of $290.28. This amount does not appear on the Seller's statement. 7) On schedule C disbursements please explain county recording fees of $88.00. This amount does not appear on the seller statement. 8) On schedule C disbursements please explain and file a receipt for water/energy compliance (required per code) of $1.200.00. This amount does not appear on the seller statement. 9) The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. [LRSF 14.35 D.] 10) The March 4, 2021 Supplement must be filed as an amendment and noticed. 11) The caption of the order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6) b.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/19/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

The proposed order must match what is requested in the petition. 2) Additionally, Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b).
